MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: John MacPete, Esq. 214/675-1789 for pltf & opposing party; Cheryl A. Stevens, Esq. 510/267-0900 for defts & moving parties James M. Kennedy and Pyramid Business Systems, Inc.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Deny motion for summary judgment. Deny motion for summary adjudication as to 1st cause of action dissolution of partnership & accounting, 2nd cause of action breach of fiduciary duty, 3rd cause of action conversion, and 4th cause of action breach of contract with partial performance; grant as to 5th cause of action fraud and 6th cause of action negligent misrepresentation.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Deft to prepare order.
